mapper.sql: cni.id, cni.customer_id, cni.nurse_item_id, cni.nurse_count, cni.nurse_date, cni.create_time, cni.is_deleted
mapper.select:
SELECT , nc.content_name AS content_name, c.customer_name AS customer_name, DATE_FORMAT(cni.nurse_date, '%Y-%m-%d') AS nurse_date_str FROM customernurseitem cni LEFT JOIN nurselevelitem nli ON cni.nurse_item_id = nli.id AND nli.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN nursecontent nc ON nli.nurse_content_id = nc.id AND nc.is_deleted = 0 LEFT JOIN customer c ON cni.customer_id = c.id AND c.is_deleted = 0
cni.is_deleted = 0
AND c.customer_name LIKE CONCAT('%', #{customerName}, '%')
ORDER BY cni.create_time DESC
